title: Bookkeeping dashboard
prompt: Build me a very small bookkeeping dashboard for a local shop. I want overdue invoices, this week revenue, a recent activity list, and a quick way to add a new invoice.

title: Sales follow-up tracker
prompt: Make a tiny follow-up tracker for sales calls. I need to add people, mark status, change next contact date, and still see the saved list after updates.

title: Desktop snippet desk
prompt: Create a desktop snippet desk for support work. Give me a sidebar, categories, a main snippet list, and a clear add snippet action.

title: Fulfillment steps API
prompt: Build a tiny backend for fulfillment steps with endpoints to list orders, create one, mark packed, and mark shipped.

title: CSV ticket summary CLI
prompt: Create a small command-line tool that reads a CSV file of support tickets and prints a short status summary grouped by priority.

title: Money format helper package
prompt: Create a tiny reusable JavaScript package that formats money amounts, percentage deltas, and compact counts for dashboards.

title: Shipment exceptions API
prompt: Build a tiny backend service for shipment exceptions with endpoints to list exceptions, create one, assign an owner, and mark one resolved.

title: Refunds math helper package
prompt: Create a small reusable JavaScript package for refunds math with helpers for subtotal, fees, tax, refund amount, and net payout.

title: Field service visits tracker
prompt: Create a tiny web app for tracking field service visits. I need a form to add a visit, a visible list of saved visits, status updates, and a quick filter by technician.

title: Markdown handoff priority CLI
prompt: Create a tiny command-line tool that reads a markdown handoff file and prints action items grouped by priority.

title: Dispatch follow-up workspace
prompt: Build a small internal operations workspace for dispatch follow-ups. I need overdue items, owner assignment, status changes, and a visible saved list I can keep updating.
